name: SP Plus Corporation
description: SP Plus Corporation is a leading provider of technology-driven mobility solutions, parking management, and ground transportation services for aviation, commercial, hospitality, and institutional clients. Headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, the company integrates advanced technology with operational expertise to optimize facility performance, enhance revenue, and improve the customer experience. SP+ offers a comprehensive suite of services, including event logistics, facility maintenance, and luggage management, serving a diverse range of industries across North America. Following its acquisition by Metropolis Technologies, Inc. in 2024, the company continues to focus on delivering innovative, frictionless mobility experiences for a world on the go.
